div.p: Constant time complexity (3 operations) regardless of pool size.

ul.li: Time Complexity: O(1). Only involves 1 memory read and 1 memory write.
Space Complexity: O(1). No additional allocation required for management.
Thread Safety: Requires atomic CAS on free_list_head if multi-threaded.

g.text: Nodes store next pointer in the first 8 bytes of the block itself.
